title: Autonomy receipts mirrored in memory log
summary: Logged the missing Oct 19 autonomy coordinator/evolution runs into memory/log.jsonl and documented the remediation to keep the chronology intact.
signals: tools.memory.gap_audit flagged autonomy plans without memory entries; autonomy receipts lived only under _report/agent/*.
actions: Appended two memory/log.jsonl entries citing the relevant receipts and captured this reflection so future audits can trace the fix.
notes: Satisfies plan step S2 for the memory ledger backfill by providing a durable reflection tied to the updated log entries.
